plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to eliminate risk.
Reduce broad index exposure to manage concentration.
Increase allocation to income-generating assets.
Trim high-conviction tech to reduce sector risk.
Add a defensive sector ETF for stability.
Maintain a significant cash buffer for safety.
conservative.read: This plan prioritizes capital preservation with a target of around 1.5% monthly growth. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration risk, aiming for lower drawdowns.

plan: Reduce exposure to leveraged ETFs to a small position.
Trim broad index holdings to address concentration.
Slightly reduce income allocation.
Increase position in high-quality software.
Add new high-scoring tech names for growth.
Maintain a moderate cash buffer.
balanced.read: This balanced approach targets about 2.5% monthly growth by blending broad market exposure with quality tech and a small amount of leverage. It aims for risk-first growth with controlled drawdowns.

plan: Increase allocation to leveraged semiconductor ETFs.
Reduce broad index exposure to concentrate.
Minimize income allocation to free up capital.
Increase positions in semiconductors and AI software.
Add new high-conviction, high-scoring tech names.
Maintain a small cash buffer for rapid deployment.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets around 4% monthly growth by leaning into leverage and concentrated tech/semiconductor bets. Expect higher potential gains but also significantly larger drawdowns due to leverage and daily rebalancing of leveraged ETFs.

plan: Sell all leveraged and high-beta tech holdings.
Significantly increase allocation to income-focused ETFs.
Reduce broad index exposure to prioritize income.
Add a defensive sector ETF for stability.
Maintain a substantial cash buffer.
Focus on consistent monthly distributions over growth.
income.read: This income-focused plan targets around 1% monthly growth through steady distributions from income ETFs and defensive sectors. It prioritizes low drawdowns and reliable income, accepting lower growth potential.
